message:
Fix protobuf parser to read all buffer offsets for nullable columns

Lance nullable columns have 2 buffers: null bitmap (buffer 0) and actual
data (buffer 1). The parser was only reading the first buffer offset,
causing it to read validity bits as data values (showing -1 for all rows).

Now correctly parses all packed buffer offsets/sizes and uses the data
buffer (index 1 for nullable, index 0 for non-nullable columns).

Also adds UI improvements: infinite scroll, vector/hash badges, collapsible
file loader, and better type-based column reading.
